summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Agents section completed. All 19 features tested and working correctly. Fixed react-is dependency issue for recharts.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Zustand store is correctly implemented with no infinite loop issues
Mock data is well-structured and comprehensive
All 7 wizard steps have proper navigation and validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Agents section features are working. Fixed react-is dependency for recharts charts. Mock data includes 3 agents, transcripts, AB tests, performance metrics, prompt suggestions, and failure patterns.

agents_list_page.details: 3 mock agents displayed with correct stats cards (Total Calls: 4.2K, Deployed Agents: 2, Avg Success Rate: 90.3%, Avg Duration: 4m 59s)

agent_cards.details: Cards show total calls, success rate, avg duration, voice, model, and use case correctly

7_step_wizard.details: All 7 steps render and navigate correctly with proper step indicators

step1_basic_info.details: Agent name, description, type selection (voice), 9 use case options all working

step2_model_voice.details: 4 model options and 10 voice options with descriptions displayed correctly

step3_system_prompt.details: Template library (3 templates), personality traits, tone, role, objectives all working

step4_conversation_flow.details: Flow builder placeholder renders with Coming Soon message

step5_tools_functions.details: 5 built-in tools selection works (Calendar Booking, Data Lookup, CRM Integration, SMS/Email, Payment Processing)

step6_advanced_settings.details: Temperature, max tokens, silence timeout, language, interruptions all configurable

step7_review_deploy.details: Config summary, test button, environment selection (test/production), deploy button all working

agent_detail_page.details: Shows agent info, status, metrics (Total Calls, Success Rate, Avg Duration)

performance_metrics_tab.details: Charts and KPI cards render correctly (Call Volume Trend, Intent Recognition Performance)

call_transcripts_tab.details: Transcript list with search, detail view with messages, sentiment, intent tags

prompt_enhancement_tab.details: AI-powered suggestions prioritized by severity (1 High, 2 Medium, 1 Low)

failure_analysis_tab.details: Failure patterns with suggested fixes (Misunderstood Intent, API Timeout, etc.)

live_test_console.details: Start Test Call button works, shows test results after completion

back_to_agents_navigation.details: Back to Agents button navigates correctly

sidebar_agents_nav.details: Agents nav item shows in sidebar and highlights correctly when active

mocked_data_note: ALL agent data is MOCKED using Zustand store with mock data in /app/frontend/src/data/mock/agents.ts. No backend API calls are made.
